texto: It is when, your soul and body is brought under the subjection of the spirit that is placed inside of you, it is at that time, your spirit communes with the Lord’s Spirit , His Holy Spirit and then when you call on His Name , there is Power, there is victory
autor: Henrietta Newton Martin-Sr Legal Cons. & Author ( Greatest of All Romances-Your Potter's Call)

texto: The name of the Lord Jesus, and His Word is powerful as the two edged sword that can cut through the face of the earth and bring man to subjection to His Kingdom which is pregnant to be established. The pains of labour is being felt and will intensify in the years to come and the moment will come for us to meet our Bridegroom Christ Himself.
